heading: Omitted
label: 1236a Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , §§ 1–5, , which fixed the quantity of Manila and other fibre products, produced in the Philippine Islands, to be admitted into the United States duty free, by its own terms originally expired three years from . By Proc. No. 2272, eff. , 3 F.R. 222, , the effective period was extended for an additional three years from and including .act June 14, 1935, ch. 24049 Stat. 34052 Stat. 1534May 1, 1935Jan. 26, 1938May 1, 1938
